ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity available in stock */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the product (e.g., Enable, Disabled, Low stock) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the categories table */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the suppliers table */,
  "ean_upc" TEXT /* EAN/UPC code for the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., addition, removal) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of product involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the warehouses table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., size, color, storage capacity) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_products" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the suppliers table */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "supply_price" TEXT /* Price at which the supplier provides the product */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the supplier to deliver the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_stock" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the warehouses table */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the orders table */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
